utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. The final package contains all 7 of these items. Each is fully specified: destination (Barcelona, Spain), travel_dates (July 10–14, 2024), transportation (flight details with cost), accommodation (hotel with cost), activities (list with costs), additional_services (local transport with costs), and total_budget (cost breakdown with total). Therefore, all 7 items are present and fully detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes one destination (Barcelona, Spain), one transportation type (Budget Airline, Economy Class), one accommodation (Family Haven Hotel), and several activities (City Walking Tour, Barcelona Zoo, Beach Day, Parc de la Ciutadella Picnic & Playgrounds). From the ground-truth data, 'Barcelona, Spain' has a rating of 9. For transportation, 'budget_airlines → Economy Class' has a rating of 6. The 'Family Haven Hotel' has a rating of 9. For activities, 'City Walking Tour' has a rating of 9, and 'Zoo' has a rating of 9. The 'Barcelona Zoo' corresponds to 'Zoo'. The two free activities 'Beach Day' and 'Parc de la Ciutadella Picnic & Playgrounds' are not listed in the ground-truth dataset, so they are omitted from the rating mapping because no rating exists for them.
